parameters.query: ={{ 'SELECT p.id, p.paper_text, p.subject, p.assessment_type, p.word_count, e.overall_score, e.knowledge_score, e.critical_score, e.application_score, e.referencing_score, e.structure_score, e.ai_risk_score FROM papers p JOIN evaluations e ON e.paper_id = p.id WHERE e.id = ' + $json.body.evaluation_id + ' LIMIT 1;' }}

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4096, system: $json.systemPrompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.userMessage }] }) }}
